context_values.last_response: Implemented the approved Slice 1 only. I registered the new workspace member in [Cargo.toml](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM74ZWRWBM3AXXQ6TW4RC85H/worktree/Cargo.toml), created the crate manifest at
context_values.response.implement:
Implemented the approved Slice 1 only. I registered the new workspace member in [Cargo.toml](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM74ZWRWBM3AXXQ6TW4RC85H/worktree/Cargo.toml), created the crate manifest at [crates/myosu-games-poker/Cargo.toml](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM74ZWRWBM3AXXQ6TW4RC85H/worktree/crates/myosu-games-poker/Cargo.toml), and added the skeleton crate root at [crates/myosu-games-poker/src/lib.rs](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM74ZWRWBM3AXXQ6TW4RC85H/worktree/crates/myosu-games-poker/src/lib.rs). The new crate pins `rbp-nlhe` and `rbp-mccfr` to the reviewed robopoker rev, enables serde on the NLHE path, re-exports the current poker-facing types, and adds a compile-time serde guard plus two smoke tests. [Cargo.lock](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM74ZWRWBM3AXXQ6TW4RC85H/worktree/Cargo.lock) was updated to lock the new robopoker packages.

Verification passed with sandbox-safe commands: `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/myosu-cargo-target cargo build -p myosu-games-poker --offline`, `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/myosu-cargo-target cargo test -p myosu-games-poker --offline`, and `cargo tree -p myosu-games-poker -e features --offline`. That produced 2/2 passing tests and confirmed `rbp-nlhe`/`rbp-mccfr` serde features are active. I also wrote [outputs/games/poker-engine/implementation.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM74ZWRWBM3AXXQ6TW4RC85H/worktree/outputs/games/poker-engine/implementation.md) and [outputs/games/poker-engine/verification.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM74ZWRWBM3AXXQ6TW4RC85H/worktree/outputs/games/poker-engine/verification.md). I intentionally did not author `quality.md` or `promotion.md`, since this lane says those are owned by the Quality Gate and Review stages.

Implemented the approved Slice 1 only. I registered the new workspace member in [Cargo.toml](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM74ZWRWBM3AXXQ6TW4RC85H/worktree/Cargo.toml), created the crate manifest at [crates/myosu-games-poker/Cargo.toml](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM74ZWRWBM3AXXQ6TW4RC85H/worktree/crates/myosu-games-poker/Cargo.toml), and added the skeleton crate root at [crates/myosu-games-poker/src/lib.rs](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM74ZWRWBM3AXXQ6TW4RC85H/worktree/crates/myosu-games-poker/src/lib.rs). The new crate pins `rbp-nlhe` and `rbp-mccfr` to the reviewed robopoker rev, enables serde on the NLHE path, re-exports the current poker-facing types, and adds a compile-time serde guard plus two smoke tests. [Cargo.lock](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM74ZWRWBM3AXXQ6TW4RC85H/worktree/Cargo.lock) was updated to lock the new robopoker packages.

Verification passed with sandbox-safe commands: `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/myosu-cargo-target cargo build -p myosu-games-poker --offline`, `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/myosu-cargo-target cargo test -p myosu-games-poker --offline`, and `cargo tree -p myosu-games-poker -e features --offline`. That produced 2/2 passing tests and confirmed `rbp-nlhe`/`rbp-mccfr` serde features are active. I also wrote [outputs/games/poker-engine/implementation.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM74ZWRWBM3AXXQ6TW4RC85H/worktree/outputs/games/poker-engine/implementation.md) and [outputs/games/poker-engine/verification.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM74ZWRWBM3AXXQ6TW4RC85H/worktree/outputs/games/poker-engine/verification.md).
